data.title: Technological Convergence in 2025: Opportunities and Challenges
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the convergence of various technologies such as blockchain, artificial intelligence (AI), robotics, virtual reality (VR), and augmented reality (AR) is expected to present significant opportunities in 2025. Christian Thompson, managing director of the Sui Foundation, shared his insights at the Consensus 2025 event in Hong Kong. He highlighted the potential of integrating AI agents into blockchains, which could lead to transformative developments across multiple sectors.

Thompson emphasized the unique potential of these technologies, noting that AI, robotics, AR, VR, and blockchain offer new ways to own and manage assets. He believes that as these technologies merge, they will create pivotal moments, particularly in the realms of blockchain and AI. Thompson anticipates that these advancements are imminent and will occur within the current technological cycle.

Blockchain companies have already begun incorporating AI to improve user experiences and operational efficiency. For instance, Kite AI, a decentralized AI infrastructure provider, launched an AI-focused testnet on February 6. Additionally, the 0G Foundation introduced an $88.88 million ecosystem fund on February 5 to support projects developing AI-powered decentralized finance (DeFi) applications and autonomous agents, known as DeFAI agents.

Thompson also predicts that this technological cycle may witness the meaningful adoption of payment systems, driven by regulatory and policy clarity that encourages developers to explore the space. He suggests that increased investment liquidity will likely occur, with venture capitalists, funds, and private family offices gaining confidence to invest in the sector. Regulatory clarity is expected to unlock new investment opportunities, facilitating a transition from Web2 to Web3 and fostering experimentation, research, and development.

In the United States, there have been calls for a regulatory overhaul of the crypto sector under U.S. President Donald Trump's administration to maintain a competitive edge globally. However, some skeptics, including U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren, continue to advocate for stricter regulations on the industry. The ongoing debate highlights the challenges and opportunities that lie ahead as these technologies continue to evolve and converge.

data.title: Trump Considers Direct Payments To Americans From Cost Savings
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump announced he is contemplating distributing a portion of the savings from Elon Musk's cost-cutting initiatives directly to American citizens. Speaking at the FII Priority Summit, sponsored by Saudi Arabia's sovereign wealth fund, Trump mentioned the possibility of returning 20% to U.S. citizens and using another 20% to reduce national debt. However, he did not provide further details about the plan.

Earlier this week, James Fishback, co-founder of investment firm Azoria, suggested on social media that the federal government issue rebate checks based on savings from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). Musk responded to this idea on the X platform, indicating he would discuss it with the President.

Fishback proposed that Trump collaborate with Congress to establish a 'DOGE Dividend' or tax rebate checks funded by $400 billion, representing 20% of DOGE's $2 trillion savings target. He estimated that if the savings were distributed to taxpayer households, each could receive approximately $5,000. The exact amount DOGE has saved remains unclear.

During his first term, Trump issued stimulus checks to Americans when the COVID-19 pandemic severely impacted the U.S. economy. Musk's team is currently working on significant budget cuts and layoffs within federal agencies. The billionaire and Tesla CEO aims for a $2 trillion reduction in federal spending, which he describes as the 'ideal outcome.'

Musk assured that the 'DOGE Dividend' would not trigger inflation, as the funds would solely come from expenditure cuts, benefiting primarily taxpayers with a propensity to save. Musk received a standing ovation when introduced by Trump, who praised him as a person of 'very high IQ,' while acknowledging some minor flaws.

data.title: BNB/USDT 永续合约多空持仓人数比为 1.9，资金费率为 -0.0031%

data.title: BitMart launches PI perpetual contract, trading rewards of 50,000 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart has launched the PI/USDT perpetual contract at 16:00 (UTC+8) on February 20, 2025. To celebrate the launch of the PI perpetual contract, BitMart has launched a trading reward activity with a total prize pool of up to 50,000 USDT. The activity time is from 16:00 on February 20, 2025 to 07:59 on February 27, 2025 (UTC+8). Both new and old users can participate in winning rewards. There are additional rewards for unlocking Gleam tasks. Please click the original link to view the details of the activity.

data.title: Bitcoin Reserve Legislation Gains Momentum Across U.S. States
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, as of February 20, data from SoSovalue indicates that twenty state-level jurisdictions in the United States are initiating legislative processes related to Bitcoin reserve strategies. Fifteen of these states have seen their bills formally accepted by legislative houses and are now under committee review, marking a regional legislative wave for Bitcoin reserve laws.

In Utah, for instance, Bill HB0230 proposes allowing four public funds—the State Disaster Recovery Restricted Account, the General Fund Budget Reserve Account, the Income Tax Fund Budget Reserve Account, and the Medicaid Growth Reduction and Budget Stabilization Account—to invest up to 5% of their total assets in Bitcoin. Based on Utah's 2024 financial report, this could translate to a potential purchasing power exceeding $70 million.

Analysts from SoSovalue suggest that the strategic Bitcoin reserve legislation represents not only a breakthrough for Bitcoin within the traditional financial system but also a historic advancement. As more state governments explore similar strategies, the trend of public funds holding Bitcoin may redefine the global market's perception of Bitcoin as an asset. It is increasingly being seen not just as digital gold but as a component of national and institutional asset allocation, further solidifying its position in the global financial system.

data.title: A certain address transferred 100 million DOGE to Binance, equivalent to about 25.42 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Whale Alert monitoring, about 2 minutes ago, a certain address transferred 100 million DOGE to Binance, equivalent to approximately 25.42 million US dollars.

data.title: OdinSwap And Valhalla To Cease Operations By February 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Bitcoin network's decentralized exchange platform OdinSwap and the launch platform Valhalla have announced plans to gradually cease operations. The platforms will continue to operate until February 28, 2025, ensuring that all user funds remain secure. Users are advised to withdraw their funds by this date. After February 28, any unclaimed balances will be refunded manually, subject to applicable Bitcoin network fees. The refund process may take up to a month to complete and will only apply to balances exceeding the network fees.

During this transition period, OdinSwap remains open to strategic partnerships and invites potential partners interested in integrating the platform to reach out.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that as of February 15, the seven-day moving average of Bitcoin network transactions had decreased to 330,000, nearing a 12-month low. This marks a significant 55% drop from the historical peak of 730,000 transactions on the network. Additionally, the fees generated by Runes over the past 30 days have fallen to less than $20,000, a stark contrast to the $60 million generated on its launch day.

data.title: BitMart will launch KAITO/USDT contracts, supporting 50x leverage
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch the perpetual contract of the token KAITO (KAITO) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 20, 2025, and open the KAITO/USDT trading pair with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
Kaito AI is building an InfoFi network driven by artificial intelligence, enabling the market to more efficiently reallocate attention and capital while rewarding all participants.

data.title: Binance will update leverage and margin for multiple U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers of 1000BONKUSDT, INJUSDT, EOSUSDT and OMUSDTU-based perpetual contracts at 17:30 (Beijing time) on February 20, 2025. Users' existing positions before the update will be affected, and users are advised to make corresponding preparations before the adjustment. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
